_comment: Virtuoso Audio HRIR Asset Manifest. SHA-256 hashes verified at build time by CI license-lint job.

hrir_packs.name: CIPIC HRTF Database
hrir_packs.attribution: Algazi, V.R., Duda, R.O., Thompson, D.M., Avendano, C. (2001). The CIPIC HRTF Database. Proc. 2001 IEEE ASSP Workshop on Applications of Signal Processing to Audio and Acoustics, New Paltz, NY.

hrir_packs.name: MIT Media Lab KEMAR HRTF
hrir_packs.attribution: Gardner, W.G., Martin, K.D. (1995). HRTF Measurements of a KEMAR Dummy-Head Microphone. MIT Media Lab, Perceptual Computing Technical Report No. 280.

hrir_packs.name: SADIE II HRTF Database
hrir_packs._license_correction: CORRECTED from CC-BY-4.0 — Apache-2.0 per University of York primary source
hrir_packs.attribution: Granier, J., Coleman, P., Pike, C., Carpentier, T. (2019). The SADIE II Database: a large binaural and envelopment database. J. Audio Eng. Soc., 67(3), 99-110.

hrir_packs.name: OpenAL Soft Default HRTF
hrir_packs.attribution: kcat/openal-soft contributors (https://github.com/kcat/openal-soft). Source available under LGPL-2.1.

_ci_lint_note: CI job 'license-lint' checks that every entry in hrir_packs has a license in allowed_license_ids. Build fails if not.
